title: lobelia stuhlmannii var. lanuriensis
intro: Lobelia stuhlmannii var. lanuriensis is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. It is a variant of the Lobelia stuhlmannii plant, which is a flowering plant native to Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lobelia stuhlmannii var. lanuriensis include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
